betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Conveyors§f

§aThe simplest and cheapest way to move items around your factory!§f

§bConveyor Belts§f transport items between machines. They pick up dropped items or items from conveyor ejectors and drop them at the end of the line if no inserter is present. Items do not collide, so throughput is effectively unlimited.

§6Variants§f:
§b• Standard Belts§f (yellow) — basic single-lane transport
§b• Double-Lane§f (red) — 3-wide belt for aesthetics or grabber use
§b• Triple-Lane§f (purple) — 3-wide with steel plates
§b• Express Belts§f (green) — faster version crafted with Engine Lubricant

§6Crafting§f:
§b• Leather Belt§f: 3 leather + 2 ingots → 16 belts
§b• Rope Belt§f: 2 rope + 2 plates + 2 ingots → 16 belts
§b• Rubber Belt§f: 3 rubber + 2 ingots → 64 belts (most efficient)

§b• Express Belt§f: 8 belts + 1 UFT Engine Lubricant → 8 express belts

§eTip§f: Always use the §brubber recipe§f for the cheapest belt cost per unit. Double-lane and triple-lane belts are mainly decorative unless you use conveyor grabbers!
